/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/Security.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/Security.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Security.dir/src/encoders/base64.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Security.dir/src/encoders/base85.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Security.dir/src/encoders/base32.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Security.dir/src/encoders/base36.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Security.dir/src/crypto/chacha20.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Security.dir/src/crypto/key_manager.cpp.o -o Security  /usr/lib/libcrypto.so
